title: Google Sheets node cannot find specified sheet ID
symptom: The Google Sheets node throws an error stating 'Sheet with ID 1366469942 not found' when attempting to append data. The specified ID does not match any existing sheets in the spreadsheet.
not_this_if: The sheet ID is correctly specified and exists in the spreadsheet
root_cause: The error occurs because the Google Sheets node is trying to access a sheet using an ID that does not exist in the specified spreadsheet. This can happen if the sheet was deleted, or if the ID was incorrectly referenced from a list instead of using the sheet's name.
fix_steps: Open the Google Sheets node settings
Change the sheet identification method from 'From list' to 'By name'
Specify the exact name of the target sheet
Save the workflow and re-run it
agent_instruction: Change the sheet identification method to use the sheet's name instead of its ID.
